case_studies.title: Global Tech Product Launch with Immersive LED Wall
case_studies.summary: High-impact global product launch for a technology client featuring a 60-foot curved LED video wall and interactive demos.
case_studies.description: Our team produced a flagship product launch for a cloud software company, transforming a downtown venue into an immersive brand environment. A 60-foot curved LED video wall served as the stage backdrop, displaying dynamic motion graphics, live camera feeds, and real-time social media content. The event hosted over 800 in-person attendees and thousands of virtual viewers. We managed all stage design, content programming, live streaming, and presenter coaching.

case_studies.title: Software Suite Launch with Multi-Segment LED Canvas
case_studies.summary: Regional launch event for a software suite using a segmented LED wall to highlight product stories.
case_studies.description: For a major SaaS provider, we designed a regional launch experience that combined a segmented LED video wall with kinetic lighting and synchronized audio. The LED canvas displayed animated UI walkthroughs, customer testimonials, and live data visualizations, helping the audience connect with the new product suite. Over 550 attendees participated in-person, with simultaneous streaming to three additional markets.

case_studies.title: Annual Investor Day Hybrid Summit
case_studies.summary: Hybrid investor day with synchronized in-room and remote experiences for a global asset manager.
case_studies.description: We produced a hybrid investor summit with 320 in-room attendees and over 2,000 remote participants. The event featured multi-camera live switching, secure webcast distribution, and branded motion graphics. Our team handled agenda design, speaker rehearsals, and on-site production, ensuring compliance-friendly messaging and flawless transitions between panels, keynotes, and Q&A sessions.

case_studies.title: Healthcare System Leadership Town Hall
case_studies.summary: System-wide hybrid town hall for a healthcare network with live Q&A and remote clinic participation.
case_studies.description: A regional healthcare system engaged us to produce a leadership town hall connecting the main campus with eight satellite clinics. We implemented secure live streaming, moderated Q&A, and real-time polling to give frontline staff a voice. The production emphasized clear audio, accessibility, and simple remote participation, with detailed run-of-show planning to keep clinical operations uninterrupted.

case_studies.title: National Retail Sales Kickoff Experience
case_studies.summary: High-energy sales kickoff with LED stage, live entertainment, and interactive product zones.
case_studies.description: For a national retailer, we produced a multi-day sales kickoff featuring main-stage general sessions, breakouts, and a branded expo floor. A wide LED wall and intelligent lighting created dynamic main-stage looks. We coordinated entertainment, scripting, and content development, plus gamified learning stations in the expo to reinforce new product priorities and sales behaviors.

case_studies.title: Three-City Manufacturing Customer Roadshow
case_studies.summary: A three-city roadshow bringing technical product demos to regional manufacturing hubs.
case_studies.description: We designed a modular roadshow experience that traveled to three regional markets. The production design balanced consistency with local customization, including a portable stage set, branded kiosks, and regional customer panels. We standardized AV specs, run-of-show templates, and staffing models to maintain quality while controlling budget.

case_studies.title: Executive Leadership Retreat in Napa
case_studies.summary: Three-day leadership retreat with strategic workshops and experiential dinners.
case_studies.description: We partnered with a financial services firm to design an offsite leadership retreat for 80 executives. The program featured facilitated strategy sessions, wellness activities, and winery dinners. Our team managed venue sourcing, AV production, content capture, and on-site logistics, with a strong emphasis on privacy, Wi-Fi reliability, and seamless transitions between sessions.

case_studies.title: Virtual Healthcare Innovation Conference
case_studies.summary: Fully virtual innovation summit connecting clinicians, researchers, and startups.
case_studies.description: Amid travel limitations, a healthcare innovation organization pivoted to a fully virtual format. We produced a two-day conference with four concurrent tracks, virtual sponsor booths, and on-demand session libraries. Our team handled platform selection, speaker tech-checks, registration workflows, and post-event analytics, generating actionable insights on engagement and content performance.

case_studies.title: Retail Brand 25th Anniversary Gala
case_studies.summary: Anniversary gala with dynamic LED content, live music, and award presentations.
case_studies.description: To celebrate 25 years in business, a retail client hosted a black-tie gala for employees, partners, and VIP customers. We created a modular LED backdrop that shifted from archival brand imagery to live performance visuals. The evening included awards, recognition moments, and a surprise musical performance, all supported by a tight cue-to-cue and camera coverage for highlight reels.

case_studies.title: Global Technology All-Hands Meeting
case_studies.summary: Quarterly all-hands meeting with live Q&A and simultaneous interpretation.
case_studies.description: A fast-growing technology company needed a scalable format for its global all-hands. We designed a production approach that combined a central studio, regional watch parties, and remote presenters. Features included moderated Q&A, real-time polling, and simultaneous interpretation into four languages. Post-event, we delivered chaptered recordings and highlight clips for internal channels.

case_studies.title: Nonprofit Impact Awards Gala
case_studies.summary: Fundraising and recognition gala with compelling storytelling and live-streamed program.
case_studies.description: We partnered with a nonprofit to produce an impact awards gala that combined fundraising with powerful storytelling. The program featured honoree stories, live performances, and a paddle raise supported by live text-to-pledge. Our team provided stage design, scripting support, video content production, and a simple livestream for remote donors.

case_studies.title: Boutique Tech Product Launch & Media Briefing
case_studies.summary: Intimate product launch and media briefing focused on demos and thought leadership.
case_studies.description: A growth-stage tech company needed an intimate launch experience for analysts, press, and key customers. We transformed a loft venue into a demo-rich environment with short keynote content, hands-on stations, and a hosted media Q&A. The scaled production focused on curated experiences and high-quality content capture for later digital distribution.
